privileged_info_summary: The meal rotation tracker task uses synthetically generated data: 60 days of dinner entries randomly selected from a pool of 20 meals (including Spaghetti, Tacos, Chicken Stir-fry, Pizza, Grilled Salmon, Beef Chili, Roast Chicken, Burgers, Lasagna, and 11 others). The verifier requires 5 of 7 criteria to pass (70% threshold): date arithmetic formulas using TODAY(), MAXIFS/MAX+IF for calculating days since last eaten, COUNTIF for meal frequency, valid numeric results (0-60 range), conditional formatting with green for ≥21 days and red for ≤7 days, organized summary structure, and error-free formulas. Task parameters: 180 second timeout, maximum 15 steps. No metadata field exists in task.json itself.
